ideas.title: The 3-Word Framework That Solved My Team's Burnout
ideas.solution: LinkedIn post sharing a simple 3-word decision framework that reduced team stress by 60%
ideas.angle: Not generic advice - a specific, tested framework with numbers
ideas.validation: Reddit thread on burnout went viral (2.5k upvotes), Monday spikes in mental health topics

ideas.title: Why Your SaaS Onboarding Sucks (And 3 Fixes That Took 2 Hours)
ideas.solution: Case study post showing 3 specific UI changes that increased activation by 40%
ideas.angle: Not more features - just better UX with before/after screenshots
ideas.validation: G2 reviews mention poor onboarding as top complaint, competitor weakness analysis

ideas.title: The Async Communication Blueprint - 3 Tools We Killed, 1 We Kept
ideas.solution: Twitter thread documenting team's journey from 7 tools to 2 tools, with chaos metrics
ideas.angle: Radical transparency with real numbers (meetings reduced by 70%, team satisfaction up 45%)
ideas.validation: Twitter #buildinpublic engagement, LinkedIn posts on remote work pain points

ideas.title: I Cut My Support Tickets in Half By Doing This One Thing
ideas.solution: LinkedIn carousels showing a simple FAQ template + AI triage setup
ideas.audience: Customer support leads at SaaS companies
ideas.angle: Not hire more support but work smarter with existing team
ideas.validation: Twitter complaints about slow support, competitor weakness in support

ideas.title: The Pricing Page That Made Competitors Look Expensive
ideas.solution: Case study of a pricing page redesign that increased trial signups by 35%
ideas.angle: Show competitor pricing next to ours (without naming them), highlight transparent vs confusing
ideas.validation: Reddit pricing is too complex threads, competitor pricing weakness

ideas.title: 5 Product Features I Killed (And What Happened)
ideas.solution: Post sharing data on feature kill results - engagement, retention, churn impact
ideas.angle: Radical transparency about product decisions that hurt then helped
ideas.validation: Reddit bloatware complaints, competitor weakness: too complex for small teams

ideas.title: The Email Template That Fixed 80% of My Customer Churn
ideas.solution: 3-part email sequence template with real copy + open/click stats
ideas.angle: Not fancy, just works - show actual subject lines and body copy
ideas.validation: LinkedIn posts on churn reduction, high engagement on customer success content

ideas.title: Mobile App Mistake #1: The Dashboard Everyone Hates
ideas.solution: Post showing common mobile dashboard failures + the 3-component alternative
ideas.angle: You're copying desktop patterns that don't work on mobile
ideas.validation: App store reviews, competitor mobile weakness

ideas.title: Team Feels Disconnected? The 15-Minute Ritual That Fixed Everything
ideas.solution: LinkedIn post + downloadable PDF template of a simple weekly ritual
ideas.angle: Not a meeting, not a tool, just a ritual - no product pitch
ideas.validation: LinkedIn remote work engagement, Reddit team management threads

ideas.title: How We Turned 'Can't Find What I Need' Into A 3-Minute Setup
ideas.solution: Tutorial on setting up a simple help center with 3-step navigation
ideas.angle: Stop building complex search, build better navigation
ideas.validation: Twitter documentation complaints, competitor weakness in UX

ideas.title: AI Fatigue Is Real: Here's How We Cut AI Features by 70%
ideas.solution: Opinion post taking anti-AI hype stance with data
ideas.angle: Be the company that removes AI, not adds it
ideas.validation: Skeptical AI sentiment in #buildinpublic, fatigue conversations emerging

ideas.title: The 4-Step Integration Checklist That Saves 10 Hours/Week
ideas.solution: Twitter thread with checklist + code snippets
ideas.angle: Not more integrations, better integrations - focus on documentation quality
ideas.validation: Developer community engagement, support forum questions

ideas.title: Founder Mental Health: The Daily Checklist (Not More Tasks)
ideas.solution: Simple 3-question daily check-in framework (no journaling, no tracking)
ideas.angle: Additive mental health doesn't work - subtraction does
ideas.validation: High Monday engagement on mental health, Reddit burnout virality

ideas.title: Competitor Response: When They Copy You, Do This
ideas.solution: LinkedIn post with 3 strategies for responding to copycat features
ideas.angle: Being copied validates you - here's how to leverage it
ideas.validation: Competitor monitoring shows feature copying, founder questions on competition

ideas.title: The 80/20 of Customer Support: 3 Types of Tickets, 3 Responses
ideas.solution: Framework post showing 80% of tickets fall into 3 categories + templates for each
ideas.angle: Stop customizing every response - standardize the 80%
ideas.validation: Support ticket analysis, Twitter support complaints
